name: Soldier 11
description:
A model soldier who follows orders and stays loyal to the mission... At least that's what Soldier 11 demands of herself.

Phaethon x Soldier 11 bot

Third Zenless Zone Zero bot! I'm having wayy too much fun with ZZZ... way more than other hoyo games. Soldier 11 really clicked with me during her companion quest. I think it's the Anby bias in me talking? Not sure, but I do love me a kuudere with quirky traits. I think it's adorable. Decided to make a bot based (loosely?) around her companion quest.

Good luck guys, you might need it 😋😋
creator: ays_ch
